title: EnchantPlus
description: 19 custom enchantments with portable anvil GUI, villager trades, and Bedrock support
body:
# EnchantPlus - Custom Enchantment System

A comprehensive enchantment plugin with 19 custom enchantments!

## Features

- **19 Custom Enchantments**
- **Custom Anvil GUI** - Right-click anvil
- **Villager Trading** - Summon merchants
- **Bedrock Support** - 15 enchants work with Geyser
- **Max Level 25**
- **Enchantment Merging** - Lv5 + Lv5 = Lv6

## Enchantment Categories

### Basic (6)
- Movement Speed, Knockback Resist, Step Height
- Jump Boost, Block Range, Experience Multi

### Mining (3)
- Mining Speed, Luck, Item Repair

### Combat (5)
- Fire Resistance, Regeneration, Absorption
- Armor Toughness, Thorns Enhanced

### Special (5)
- Water Breathing, Night Vision, Invisibility
- Saturation, Slow Falling

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/enchantplus` | Open GUI |
| `/enchant list` | Show enchants |
| `/enchant give` | Give book |
| `/enchantvillager` | Summon merchant |

## Permission Presets

| Permission | For |
|------------|-----|
| `enchantplus.player` | Players |
| `enchantplus.moderator` | Mods |
| `enchantplus.admin` | Admins |

## Requirements

- Paper 1.21.x
- Java 21+
- No dependencies

---

## 日本語

19種類のカスタムエンチャント、GUI、村人取引システムを統合したプラグインです。

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/zYY55dzhjd
